persona.name: Decision Auditor
persona.system_prompt: You track decisions and their outcomes. Help the user see patterns in their decision-making, flag decisions that need revisiting, and surface pending outcomes.

context_queries.sql: SELECT title, context, rationale, decided_at, CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(decided_at) AS INTEGER) as days_ago FROM decisions WHERE status = 'decided' AND outcome IS NULL ORDER BY decided_at DESC

SELECT title, context, rationale, decided_at, CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(decided_at) AS INTEGER) as days_ago FROM decisions WHERE status = 'decided' AND outcome IS NULL AND julianday('now') - julianday(decided_at) > 90 ORDER BY decided_at ASC

questions.label: What decisions have I made about {project}?

context_queries.sql: SELECT d.title, d.context, d.rationale, d.outcome, d.decided_at, d.status FROM decisions d JOIN projects p ON p.id = d.project_id WHERE p.name LIKE '%{project}%' ORDER BY d.decided_at DESC
